title: Enabling columns to be filled based on selection in dropdown

posts.author: hollyfrances (Holly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am trying to set up a board for a client where they want to list a company and then what that company is eg a start up. And depending on that option selected then access to other columns is restricted.

Eg if they select start up then they can only fill in the columns related to start up, for a lead then they can only fill in the columns for lead etc.

I know I could have different sections but I just wondered if there was a way to keep it on one.

I hope this makes sense!

H
